description:
Native Windows LAN printer repair tool for common printer, Spooler, SMB, and Point and Print errors.

Fixprinter is a native Windows console utility for LAN printer issues including Print Spooler, SMB, NetBIOS, Point and Print, 0x0000011b, 0x00000709, default printer, WSD/SNMP offline status, Microsoft Store repair, basic Realtek audio helper actions, and driver Hardware ID reporting/install from folder.
Fixes normal user launch behavior. Validation-safe commands still run without elevation, while normal interactive launch requests Administrator permission and opens the repair menu.
